rows.label: tev015402_0001
rows.name:
The day has finally come for
Lin's dream to be a reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015402_0002
rows.name:
We'll handle prepping
the machine itself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015402_0003
rows.name:
But now its fate rests on whether or not
we can recruit test pilots through the
posting Vandham made at Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015402_0004
rows.name:
I sure hope his post catches the
eye of some skilled Doll pilots...[ST:wait ]
